title: Events Module
subtitle: Venues · Capabilities · Booking
description: From waterfront promenades to atrium-scale productions, The Dubai Mall offers modular event infrastructure for brands, agencies, and promoters evaluating UAE activations.

venues.title: Fashion Dome & Avenue
venues.description: Runway-ready environments adjacent to luxury retail—ideal for fashion shows, beauty launches, and VIP receptions.

venues.title: Waterfront Promenade
venues.description: Outdoor-facing activations with Dubai Fountain adjacency—premium visibility for launches and festivals.

venues.title: Grand Atrium & Expo Formats
venues.description: Large-format footprints for auto reveals, conventions, and brand villages with multi-day build windows.

venues.title: Dubai Ice Rink Events
venues.description: Olympic-size rink for sports entertainment, private hire, and themed experiences.

pastHighlights.title: Global fashion showcases
pastHighlights.description: Regional debuts and runway moments driving luxury footfall across Fashion Avenue.

pastHighlights.title: Brand takeover weekends
pastHighlights.description: Multi-day immersive builds with measurable dwell-time and social amplification.

pastHighlights.title: Waterfront festival programming
pastHighlights.description: Fountain-adjacent concerts and seasonal festivals capturing tourist peaks.

sponsorshipTiers.name: Platinum Platform
sponsorshipTiers.description: Title-level presence across atrium, digital, and tourism channels.

sponsorshipTiers.name: Gold Activation
sponsorshipTiers.description: Seasonal campaigns with premium zones and influencer programming.

sponsorshipTiers.name: Silver Presence
sponsorshipTiers.description: Targeted activations and pop-ups with measurable footfall KPIs.
